G

getCurrentTimeAsDouble() - Static method in class se.alexanderjonsson.InternetTime
This method returns the current time in Swatch .beats as a Double.
getCurrentTimeAsInteger() - Static method in class se.alexanderjonsson.InternetTime
This method returns the current time in Swatch .beats as an integer.
getCurrentTimeAsString(TimeFormat) - Static method in class se.alexanderjonsson.InternetTime
This method returns the current time in Swatch .beats as a String.
getCurrentTimeAsString() - Static method in class se.alexanderjonsson.InternetTime
This method overloads getCurrentTimeAsString(TimeFormat format)
getCurrentTimePrettyString() - Static method in class se.alexanderjonsson.InternetTime

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum se.alexanderjonsson.TimeFormat

values() - Static method in enum se.alexanderjonsson.TimeFormat
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
